description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.12-alpine Docker image with a global before_script executing `yarn`. Define three stages: test, build, and publish. Add a `test` job in the test stage that runs `yarn test`. Add a `build` job in the build stage that runs `yarn babel` then `yarn artifacts` and publishes the `binary/*` directory as artifacts. Add a `publish` job in the publish stage that uses the inetprocess/gitlab-release image, disables the before_script, runs `gitlab-release --message "$CI_BUILD_TAG" binary/Scraper.exe binary/Scraper.exe.sha256`, and is configured to run only on tag pipelines.
